## For AI Agents

Full command reference: `README.md` in this folder. Quick reference:
```
python tracker.py list --status open --phase P0
python tracker.py set MF-P0-01.01 --status complete --evidence "..."
python tracker.py set MF-P2-05.02 --status blocked --blocked-reason "..."
python tracker.py next -n 10
python tracker.py report
```
